title: GemPlugin
description: This plugin adds a series of gems gadgets and weapons with insane superpowers
body:
#  **GemPlugin - Minecraft SMP Gem Abilities Plugin**
A comprehensive Minecraft plugin for PaperMC 1.21.9 that adds powerful gems, gadgets, and weapons to your SMP server.

(Inspired by PowerGems)

### **Features:**

🔮 15 Unique Gems
Each gem has three distinct abilities activated by different click types:

**Left Click**: Primary ability

**Right Click**: Secondary ability

**Shift Click**: Special ability

### **Available Gems:**

**Fire Gem** - Fireball attacks, fire rings, and fire resistance

**Ice Gem** - Snow golem summoning, frostbite effects, ice projectiles

**Lava Gem** - Lava manipulation and fire immunity

**Sand Gem** - Blindness effects, cobweb traps, shield disruption

**Iron Gem** - Arrow barrages, absorption, shield stunning

**Lightning Gem** - Lightning strikes, glowing effects, chain lightning

**Strength Gem** - Strength buffs, protective barriers, damage amplification

**Healing Gem** - Regeneration, damage immunity, instant healing

**Air Gem** - Fall damage immunity, launching attacks, player pulling

**Water Gem **- Aquatic abilities, speed boosts, mining fatigue

**Shadow Gem** - Darkness effects, shadow dash, invisibility

**Speed Gem** - Speed buffs, slowness attacks, quick dashes

**Pain Gem** - Area damage, weakness effects, vex summoning

**Mining Gem** - Haste effects, TNT placement, attack speed reduction

**Ender Gem** - Teleportation, dragon fireballs, glowing effects

**Gluttony Gem** - Effect stealing, health draining, random buffs


###  🛠️ **Gadgets**

Multiple gadget types with charges and lore

Gadget Charges crafted via 2x2 recipes and usable on gadgets

### **📈 Gem Upgrade System**

Upgrade gems through 5 levels using specific crafting recipes:

Level 1 → 2: Netherite Ingots + Emerald Blocks

Level 2 → 3: Netherite Ingots + Recovery Compass + Nether Star + Dragon Head

Level 3 → 4: Netherite Ingots + Nether Stars + Heavy Cores

Level 4 → 5: Netherite Ingots + Elytra + Silence Armor Trim

Each upgrade reduces ability cooldowns by 10%.


Commands
/givegem <player> <gemtype> [level]
Permission: gemplugin.givegem
Description: Give a gem to a player
Example: /givegem Steve fire 3

/givemace <player>
Permission: gemplugin.givemace
Description: Give a Shadow Mace to a player
Example: /givemace Steve

/givegadget <type> or /givegadget <player> <type>
Permission: gemplugin.givegadget
Types: nether, ender, aqua, echo, dash, pvp, wealth, core, shadowcore

/givecharge <player> [amount]
Permission: gemplugin.givecharge

/givegadgetcharge <player> [amount]
Permission: gemplugin.givegadgetcharge

/giveheart <player> [amount]
Permission: gemplugin.giveheart

/withdrawheart [amount]
Permission: gemplugin.withdraw
Alias: /withdraw

/withdrawcharge
Permission: gemplugin.withdrawcharge
Removes 1 charge from the gem in main hand and returns a Gem Charge item

/givefrozencrossbow <player>
Permission: gemplugin.givefrozencrossbow

/givefreezecore <player> [amount]
Permission: gemplugin.givefreezecore

/revive <player>
Permission: gemplugin.revive

/gemplugin reload
Permission: gemplugin.admin

Permissions

gemplugin.givegem (default: op)

gemplugin.givemace (default: op)

gemplugin.givegadget (default: op)

gemplugin.givecharge (default: op)

gemplugin.givegadgetcharge (default: op)

gemplugin.givefrozencrossbow (default: op)

gemplugin.givefreezecore (default: op)

gemplugin.giveheart (default: op)

gemplugin.withdraw (default: true)

gemplugin.withdrawcharge (default: true)

gemplugin.revive (default: op)

gemplugin.admin (default: op)

gemplugin.use (default: true)
